messages.content: No match. Try these keys: scope of supply, effective date of order, delivery schedule, order value, taxes & duties, payment terms, supplies inspections & testing, quality, warranty/ defect liability period, packing and marking, transfer of title and risk, insurance, assignment and sub-contracting, compliance of laws, suppliers representations and warranties, replacement of defective parts and materials, risk purchase, limitation of liabilities, intellectual property rights, secrecy and confidentiality, indemnification, force majeure, suspension, termination, arbitration, governing law and jurisdiction, general, general covenants
